title: Candy Cane Lane Christmas Ribbon – 2m x 22mm Red & White Grosgrain Ribbon Piece for Crafts, Gift Wrapping, Cake Decorating, Hair Bows, Eve Boxes & Festive Decorations
features: 🍭 Sweet Candy Cane Design: Classic red and white “Candy Cane Lane” print with bows and dots — perfect for fun, festive crafts.
✂️ High-Quality Grosgrain Material: Textured and durable ribbon that resists fraying, holds shape, and cuts neatly for professional finishes.
📏 Perfect Size for Crafts: Each piece measures 2 metres long and 22mm wide, ideal for Christmas decorations and creative projects.
🎁 Multi-Purpose Ribbon: Great for gift wrapping, cake decorating, wreaths, garlands, bows, hair accessories, and Christmas Eve boxes.
❤️ Vibrant & Festive Colours: Bright red and white design brings instant Christmas cheer to any project.
🎀 Easy to Work With: Flexible, strong, and perfect for both beginners and experienced crafters alike.
description: Step into the magic of the season with this Candy Cane Lane Christmas Ribbon! Each 2 metre x 22mm wide piece of high-quality grosgrain ribbon features a playful red and white candy cane print with “Candy Cane Lane” lettering and polka dots — perfect for adding a sweet festive touch to all your Christmas crafts and decorations. This ribbon is ideal for gift wrapping, cake decorating, hair accessories, Christmas Eve boxes, wreaths, garlands, and festive DIY projects. The strong grosgrain texture holds its shape beautifully, ensuring your bows, trims, and edges stay crisp and eye-catching throughout the holiday season. 🎨 Perfect For: Christmas gift wrapping & Eve boxes Cake ribbons, toppers & festive bakes DIY wreaths, garlands & home décor Hair bows, clips & accessories Holiday card making & festive scrapbooking
